findings.evidence: `rg` shows the new declarations at lines 50/84/114/129/139 without attributes, while analogous existing API is tagged: `FiberTransport.lean:100 @[simp] lemma fiberMap_smul`, `Regular.lean:157 @[simp] lemma deckEquivFiber_apply`, and `RegularTorsor.lean:66 @[simp] lemma deckEquivFiber_symm_eq_sdiv`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to these normal-form equations, or make any non-simp helper private if it is not meant to be a public rewrite rule.
findings.issue: The public characteristic transport lemmas are missing `@[simp]`: `fiberMap_sdiv_eq_conjMulEquiv_of_pretransitive` (line 50), `regular_fiberMap_sdiv_eq_conjMulEquiv` (line 84), `regular_deckEquivFiber_symm_fiberMap` (line 114), `regular_deckEquivFiber_fiberMap` (line 129), and `regular_deckEquivFiber_fiberMap_coe` (line 139).

summary: The new transport API exposes the intended characteristic equations but leaves them out of the simplifier, unlike the surrounding fibre transport and regular fibre APIs.
